    G

    geometries.api - package geometries.api
     
    geometries.impl - package geometries.impl
     
    Geometry - Class in geometries.api
    Abstract base class for all geometric objects.
    Geometry() - Constructor for class geometries.api.Geometry
    Default constructor for Geometry.
    geometryConstructorTests() - Static method in class test.Main
    Basic constructor checks for geometry classes.
    getDirection() - Method in class primitives.Ray
    Returns the normalized direction vector of the ray.
    getExp(double) - Static method in class primitives.Util
    Extracts the unbiased exponent of a double.
    getNormal(Point) - Method in class geometries.api.Geometry
    Returns the normal vector to the geometry at the given point.
    getNormal(Point) - Method in class geometries.impl.Plane
    Returns the normal vector of the plane.
    getNormal(Point) - Method in class geometries.impl.Polygon
     
    getNormal(Point) - Method in class geometries.impl.Sphere
    Returns the normal vector to the sphere at a given point.
    getNormal(Point) - Method in class geometries.impl.Tube
     
    getOrigin() - Method in class primitives.Ray
    Returns the origin point of the ray.
